inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

inputs.label: Actual Weight
inputs.businessContext: Actual weight of the package. Used to compare with volumetric weight for chargeable weight determination.

inputs.label: Dimensional Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor used by carriers (e.g., 5000 for air freight, 6000 for road). Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Transport mode affects the dimensional factor and cost structure. Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

thresholds.volumetricWeightExceedsActual: Volumetric weight exceeds actual weight by more than 50%
thresholds.dimFactorLow: Dimensional factor is below 4000, check carrier policy

hiddenLossDrivers: volumetricWeight > weight * 1.5 ? 'Volumetric weight exceeds actual weight by more than 50%' : ''
dimFactor < 4000 ? 'Dimensional factor is low, check carrier policy' : ''
suggestedActions: If volumetric weight is high, consider repackaging to reduce dimensions.
If dimFactor is low, negotiate with carrier for a higher factor.
